# ZK Relay

> Self-hosted zero-knowledge secret sharing for humans and agents. Yopass-style links; agent-safe receive.

ZK Relay is a Cloudflare Worker that stores only ciphertext. The sender's browser encrypts; recipients decrypt locally. Each share has a human link (`/h/:id`) and an agent link (`/a/:id`).

## When to use

- Share a password, API token, or small file with a person or a tool-using agent
- Prefer one-time or time-limited retrieval without accounts
- Need agents to fetch safely without putting plaintext in a chat transcript

## Agent receive (preferred)

Agent links return preflight instructions, not ciphertext. Preferred command:

```sh
zkr receive "$ZK_RELAY_URL" --output ./secret
```

Receiver contract: /protocol/v1

## Humans

Open the human link, read the warning, choose Reveal secret. Decryption happens in the browser.

## Docs

- Protocol: /protocol/v1
- Source: https://github.com/Git-on-my-level/zk-relay
- Security: https://github.com/Git-on-my-level/zk-relay/blob/main/SECURITY.md
